Cable testing follows IEC 62067 and covers type tests, routine tests, and after-installation tests. ^[7429256272cad6cf:doc:1]

## Type Testing

Validates cable system design through electrical, mechanical, and thermal tests. ^[7429256272cad6cf:doc:1]

## Routine Testing

Every manufactured length undergoes HV withstand and PD measurement. ^[7429256272cad6cf:doc:1]
